question: According to the chart, which of the following statements is true?

options.A: The latest year clearly shows that average sign-ups are now in long-term decline.
options.B: The latest year shows a sharp drop in average sign-ups compared to earlier years.
options.C: None of the above conclusions about the full-year trend are justified, because the latest year only shows data up to Apr 01, 2024.
options.D: The latest year has the lowest average sign-ups of the entire period, confirming a new low.

explanation: The latest year in the chart only includes about 2 months of data, while previous years show full 12‑month totals. Comparing the partial-year value (369 sign-ups) directly to full-year values like 2,323 sign-ups creates the illusion of a sharp decline. We cannot draw full‑year conclusions from this incomplete aggregate.
